channel.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track your favorite github awesome repo, not just star it.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Nov 2nd - Nov 8th, 2020
item.description:
Frameworks

  • Cirrusstars746 - A component and utility centric SCSS framework designed for rapid prototyping.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Sep 21st - Sep 27th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries and Mixins

Miscellaneous

  • Gerillass - A Sass mixin library to help you create modern web sites.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Aug 17th - Aug 23rd, 2020
item.description:
Libraries and Mixins

Media Queries

  • include-media - Simple, elegant and maintainable media queries.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Mar 2nd - Mar 8th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries and Mixins

Miscellaneous

  • Buttonostars79 - A flexible Sass mixin for creating BEM-style buttons.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Mar 11th - Mar 17th, 2019
item.description:
Frameworks

  • avalanche - Framework for building the foundation for a package based CSS workflow.
  • Bulmastars43.4k - Modern CSS framework based on Flexbox.
  • Kickoff - Kickoff is a lightweight front-end framework for creating scalable, performant and responsive sites.
  • Materialize - Modern responsive front-end framework based on Material Design.
  • Scooter - SCSS framework built to provide base styles, CSS components, and rapid static prototyping for Dropbox.
  • Sierra - Micro SCSS library to help you build websites, without all the arbitrary selectors.

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Grid

  • Avalanche - Lightweight, responsive, Sass-based, BEM-syntax grid system.
  • Griddle - Extremely flexable CSS grid constructor.
  • Jeetstars3k - Simple fractional grid system for Sass and Stylus.
  • SCSS Flexible Grid System - SCSS flexible grid system.

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Media Queries

  • Breakpointstars2.1k - Breakpoint makes writing media queries in Sass super simple.
  • mq-scssstars124 - An extreamly powerful but easy to use Sass media query mixin.

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Color

  • scss-blend-modesstars824 - Using standard color blending functions in Sass.

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Typography

  • Typistars863 - Sass mixin to make responsive typography easy.

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Animation

  • Sass Burgerstars664 - Sass mixin for creating animated hamburger icon.
  • SpinThatShit - Set of SCSS mixins for single element loaders and spinners.

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Miscellaneous

  • Angled Edgesstars971 - Sass mixin for creating angled edges on sections by dynamically encoding SVGs.
  • csstyle - A SCSS library to help you build modular CSS that generates your selectors for you and deals with specificity automatically.
  • Family.scss - Set of 26 smart Sass mixins which will help you to manage the style of :nth-child’ified elements, in an easy and classy way.
  • Juice - Collection of Sass mixins and functions.
  • normalize-scssstars1.4k - Sass/Compass version of Normalize.css, a collection of HTML element and attribute rulesets to normalize styles across all browsers.
  • Pretty checkboxstars1.7k - SCSS/CSS library to beautify checkbox and radio buttons.
  • Sass flexbox mixinstars1.1k - Set of mixins for those who want to mess around with flexbox using the native support of current browsers.
  • Sassdashstars379 - The Sass implementation of lodash (API documentation).
  • Scutstars766 - Collection of Sass utilities to ease and improve the implementations of common style-code patterns.

    • Tools

  • dart-sassstars2.3k - Dart implementation of Sass.
  • diamond - Dependency management built for Sass, Less, and CSS.
  • libsass-pythonstars490 - Binding of libsass for Python.
  • node-sass-magic-importerstars277 - Custom node-sass importer for selector specific imports, node importing, module importing, globbing support and importing files only once.
  • OctoLinkerstars4.7k - Navigate through *.scss and *.sass files efficiently with the OctoLinker browser extension for GitHub.
  • sass-extractstars183 - Extract variables from scss files. Use scss to describe styles for use in javascript by extracting computed styles into js objects. Supports imports and advanced language features.
  • SassDoc - Documentation system (like JSDoc for JavaScript) to build pretty and powerful docs in the blink of an eye.
  • Scout-App - Process your Sass and SCSS files into CSS without needing any knowledge of the command line.
  • stylelint - A mighty, modern CSS linter that helps you enforce consistent conventions and avoid errors in your stylesheets. Supports CSS-like syntaxes, including SCSS.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Dec 17th - Dec 23rd, 2018
item.description:
Videos

  • Learn Sass in this Free Crash Course - Give your CSS Superpowers!
  • The Net Ninja Sass playlist

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Nov 5th - Nov 11th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries and Mixins

Animation

  • Kf - Sass mixin library for creating keyframe-based animations from maps.

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Grid

  • Sass Flexible Grid System - Sass flexible grid system.

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Media Queries

  • Sass MediaQueries - Collection of useful media queries mixins for Sass (including iOS devices, TVs and more).

Color

  • sass-planifoliastars34 - Advanced color manipulation and contrast calculation in vanilla Sass.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Nov 13th - Nov 19th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries and Mixins

Miscellaneous

  • Sass Accoutrement - Accoutrement modules are Sass toolkits that work together to form the central configuration of a project. The tools can be used individually, or integrated for extra power.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Oct 23rd - Oct 29th, 2017
item.description:
Tools

  • SharpScssstars45 - P/Invoke .NET wrapper around libsass to convert SCSS to CSS supporting NET2.0/NET3.5/NET4.x+ and CoreCLR platform.

item.description:

Grid

  • Waffle Grid - Easy to use flexbox grid system.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass May 29th - Jun 4th, 2017
item.description:
Articles

  • Build a Style Guide Straight from Sass

    • Frameworks

  • Hocus-Pocus - Universal and lightweight stylesheet starter kit that focuses on base html elements and typography.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass May 22nd - May 28th, 2017
item.description:
Frameworks

  • Bootstrap-sassstars12.8k - Official Sass port of Bootstrap 2 and 3.
  • mini.css - Minimal, responsive, style-agnostic CSS framework.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass May 1st - May 7th, 2017
item.description:
Frameworks

  • iotaCSS - Open source Sass-based OOCSS framework built for scale.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Apr 10th - Apr 16th, 2017

Tools

  • scss-lintstars3.5k - Configurable tool for writing clean and consistent SCSS. (deprecated)stars3.5k

  • A Tale of CSS and Sass Precision

item.description:

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Nov 21st - Nov 27th, 2016
item.description:
Tools

  • sass-railsstars823 - Ruby on Rails stylesheet engine for Sass.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Nov 14th - Nov 20th, 2016
item.description:
Videos

  • Sass Tutorial
  • Series of Sass tutorials showing the installing of, the basics, and using key features
  • Sass or LESS? What should you use?

    • Books

  • Sass in the Real World: Book I of IV
  • Sass in the Real World: Book II of IV
  • Jump Start Sass: Get Up to Speed With Sass in a Weekend
  • Sass and Compass for Designers

    • Tools

  • sass-loaderstars3.6k - Sass loader for webpack.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Nov 7th - Nov 13th, 2016
item.description:
Tools

  • node-sassstars7.7k - Node.js bindings to libsass.
  • libsassstars4.2k - C/C++ implementation of a Sass compiler.

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Grid

  • Neat - Lightweight semantic grid framework built with Sass.
  • Toast - Flexible and lightweight grid framework from the creator of animate.css.

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Media Queries

  • Sass MQstars1.9k - Sass mixin that helps you compose media queries in an elegant way.

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Animation

  • Animate.scssstars646 - Port of Dan Eden's Animate.css for SASS.
  • Hover - Collection of CSS3 powered hover animated effects to be applied to links, buttons, logos, SVG, featured images and so on. Available in CSS, Sass, and LESS.

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Miscellaneous

  • Bourbon - Simple and lightweight mixin library for Sass.
  • Buttonsstars5.1k - CSS button library built using Sass and Compass.

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Typography

  • Shevy - Typography made easy. A vertical rhythm library.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Oct 31st - Nov 6th, 2016
item.description:
Community

  • Reddit
  • Stack Overflow
  • @SassCSS on Twitter

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Oct 24th - Oct 30th, 2016
item.description:
Libraries and Mixins

Grid

  • csswizardry-grids - Simple, fluid, nestable, flexible, Sass-based, responsive grid system.
  • Gridlex - Flexbox grid system.
  • Susystars3.9k - Responsive layout toolkit for Sass.

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Color

  • brand-colors - 1100+ collection of popular brand colors available in Sass, Less, Stylus and CSS.
  • Open colorstars4.3k - Open color is a color scheme for UI design. Available in CSS, SCSS, LESS, Stylus, Adobe library, Photoshop/Illustrator swatches and Sketch palette.

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Typography

  • Sassline - Set text on the web to a baseline grid with Sass & rems using a responsive modular-scale.
  • Sassy-Gridloverstars223 - Super easy to use Sass mixins to establish a typographic system with modular scale and vertical rhythm. Based on the Gridlover app.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Oct 10th - Oct 16th, 2016
item.description:
Articles

  • Hugo Giraudel Personal Awesome Sass Liststars733 - Records of Hugo Giraudel's works on Sass.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Oct 3rd - Oct 9th, 2016
item.description:
Articles

  • A Sass !default use case
  • Styling React Components in Sass

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Miscellaneous

  • retina.jsstars4.5k - JavaScript, SCSS, Sass, Less, and Stylus helpers for rendering high-resolution image variants.

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Sep 26th - Oct 2nd, 2016
item.description:
Articles

  • Stop Arguing So Much with Your Mixins
  • Inverse trigonometric functions with Sass
  • Sass Maps to UI Components
  • Transitioning to SCSS at Scale
  • Cubic Bézier Representation in Sass
  • Faster Sass builds with Webpack

item.title: Famolus/awesome-sass Sep 19th - Sep 25th, 2016
item.description:
Getting Started

  • Official Sass and SCSS Reference - Official Sass and SCSS Documentation Reference.
  • Codecademy - Learn Sass with Codecademy.
  • SitePoint Sass and SCSS Reference - SitePoint Sass and SCSS reference.
  • Official Sass and SCSS Guide - Official Sass and SCSS guide.
  • Lynda - Learn how to use Sass, from beginner basics to advanced techniques, with online video tutorials taught by industry experts.
  • Tutorialzine - Learn SASS in 15 minutes tutorial.

    • Libraries and Mixins

    Miscellaneous

  • Modular Scalestars2k - Modular scale calculator built into your Sass.

    • Style Guides

  • Dropbox (S)CSS Style Guidestars737 - Dropbox’s (S)CSS authoring style guide.
  • Hugo Giraudel's Sass Guidelines - Guidelines for writing sane, maintainable and scalable Sass.
  • BigCommerce Sass Coding Guidelinesstars275 - Guidelines in use at BigCommerce.
  • Airbnb Sass and CSS Style Guidestars5.8k - Sass and CSS style guide by Airbnb.

    • Sass vs SCSS

  • SitePoint - What’s the difference between Sass and SCSS?
  • The Sass Way - Which syntax is better?
  • Stack Overflow - What's the difference between SCSS and Sass?

    • Frameworks

  • Bootstrap 4stars149.9k - Bootstrap version 4, the most popular HTML, CSS, and JS framework for developing responsive, mobile first projects on the web.
  • Foundation for Sitesstars29k - The most advanced responsive front-end framework in the world. Quickly create prototypes and production code for sites that work on any kind of device.
